random.cdisc.data 0.1.0
  • Reference

Measurements Dataset

atr.Rd

This is reflecting measurement data used in SPA ed(pRed)

atr(ADSL, FUN = function(p) {     PARAMCD <- c("LDIAM", "SUMTGLES")     PARAM
  <- c("Longest Diameter", "Sum of Target Lesions")     data.frame(USUBJID =
  p$USUBJID, STUDYID = p$STUDYID, PARAMCD = PARAMCD, PARAM = PARAM, AVAL =
  vapply(PARAMCD, function(paramcd) {         switch(paramcd, LDIAM =
  ifelse(p$ARM == "ARM A", rlnorm(1, 1), rlnorm(1, 1.2)), SUMTGLES =
  ifelse(p$ARM == "ARM A", rlnorm(1, 2), rlnorm(1, 2.2)))     }, numeric(1)),
  AVALU = "mm", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) }, ..., start_with)

Examples


radam("ATR")
#> # A tibble: 800 x 9
#>    USUBJID STUDYID PARAMCD  PARAM               AVAL AVALU   BASE     PCHG  TUDY
#>    <fct>   <fct>   <chr>    <chr>              <dbl> <chr>  <dbl>    <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 id-1    STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   3.31  mm     3.31    0          0
#>  2 id-1    STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   2.27  mm     3.31   -0.315     10
#>  3 id-1    STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   2.05  mm     3.31   -0.381     19
#>  4 id-1    STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   3.51  mm     3.31    0.0606    37
#>  5 id-1    STUDY A SUMTGLES Sum of Target Le~ 11.2   mm    11.2     0          0
#>  6 id-1    STUDY A SUMTGLES Sum of Target Le~ 64.3   mm    11.2     4.76      10
#>  7 id-1    STUDY A SUMTGLES Sum of Target Le~ 12.0   mm    11.2     0.0785    19
#>  8 id-1    STUDY A SUMTGLES Sum of Target Le~ 18.1   mm    11.2     0.620     37
#>  9 id-10   STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   0.729 mm     0.729   0          0
#> 10 id-10   STUDY A LDIAM    Longest Diameter   8.76  mm     0.729  11.0       10
#> # ... with 790 more rows
min(rlnorm(100, 1.2))
#> [1] 0.1287075
